untranslatable_reason: Trend line formations require dynamic support/resistance level tracking that is not available in the indicator set. The pattern relies on identifying two or more price extrema to construct trend lines, then trading breakouts from those lines. Available indicators use fixed periods (Donchian channels, pivots) rather than user-drawn or volatility-adjusted trend lines. Approximated using price_pos_20 extremes and pivot support/resistance as proxies, but this loses the core trend-line geometry requirement.
